summary: Verified CRITICAL FIX: About.jsx Approach section now correctly renders dynamic content from backend API. All 28 backend tests pass (100%). All public pages load with dynamic titles. Admin panel CRUD operations work correctly.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Test file used params instead of json for login requests
fixed_in_this_iteration.fix: Changed params to json for all admin login requests

issues: Shows TEST_ prefixed data from previous testing - this is expected test data, not a bug

verified_working.status: FIXED - Now renders content.approach_text from backend API
Working - All pages show 'PageName | Kirti Killedar'

critical_code_review_comments: About.jsx Approach section fix verified: Lines 132-158 now use content.approach_text with split('\n\n').map() pattern matching Background and Influences sections

Admin sidebar has duplicate navigation links (public pages + admin pages) - clicking 'About' in sidebar may navigate to public /about instead of /admin/about. Users should use direct URLs or scroll to admin section links.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, admin panel works, About page shows dynamic content)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Existing test data from previous iteration visible on Home page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED: About.jsx Approach section now correctly pulls from backend API (content.approach_text). Database contains test data: approach_text='approach text...iiii', background_text='Background text...', influences_text='Influence....eee', quote='Hello!', skills=['singer','actor']. All admin CRUD operations work. Dynamic page titles work across all pages.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: About.jsx Approach section was showing hardcoded fallback text instead of dynamic content from backend API
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Previous agent's search_replace tool failed to update the Approach section code. The section was still using static JSX instead of the dynamic content.approach_text pattern
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Main agent (E1) successfully updated lines 132-158 in About.jsx to use content.approach_text.split('\n\n').map() pattern, matching the Background and Influences sections
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Playwright test confirmed 'approach text...iiii' (from database) is now visible on the public /about page. Admin panel at /admin/about shows the same data in the Approach Text field.
